narrative: Type 01 consumption entry, cotton apparel from intermediate-country supplier. ISF late — filed after vessel loading by 8 hours (24h pre-load requirement violated). UFLPA entity list match — primary upstream cotton-spinning mill listed on UFLPA Entity List as Xinjiang Production and Construction Corps subsidiary; rebuttable presumption applies. Forced labor WRO match — secondary supplier under existing Withhold Release Order on Section 307 (19 USC §1307). HTS misclassification — declared as 6109.10.0040 (men's cotton t-shirts) but visual sample shows women's fitted top correctly classified 6109.10.0060; duty rate difference 16.5% vs 16.5% identical here but classification error opens § 1592 reasonable-care exposure. ADD/CVD evasion risk — transshipment indicator: country-of-origin marked Vietnam but documentation shows yarn + greige fabric sourced from China; AD/CVD on Chinese cotton sheeting evasion alert. FTA preference claim under CAFTA-DR has no Certification of Origin attached. Country-of-origin marking missing on individual garments. Reasonable care documentation gap — no broker advisement, no CROSS ruling reviewed. CTPAT decertification risk — Tier-1 status lapsed 2024-11 not renewed. Counterfeit IP-rights risk — trademark X on labels may be infringing; no licensing agreement on file.
